data.content: Implementation review approved. The change correctly fixes rank collisions between gate evaluation states (ReadyToEvaluate/Evaluating at 10-11) and shipment review states (ReadyForShipmentReview/ShipmentReview also at 10-11) by moving gate states to ranks 12-13 and terminal states to 14. Two new tests cover gate-parent/work-child blocking and rank uniqueness. Pre-existing test failure on main (apply_index_event_with_invariants_persists_them) is unrelated. No security issues or regressions introduced.
